title: Problem with $readmemh when passing a file as a parameter

features.name: $readmemh with string parameter as filename
features.description: Code should include a $readmemh system task where the filename argument is a module string parameter (not a string literal)

features.name: string parameter propagation through instantiation
features.description: Code should include a module instantiation where a string parameter is overridden by a value passed from a parent module parameter

features.name: read-only memory with negedge clock
features.description: Code should include a memory array (unpacked array of registers) read synchronously on the negedge of a clock
